tuning_key.text: Who are they? I wonder what they could be? / Who will help them see... If you won't?
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: Today the field is bright with gratitude for the mystery of every consciousness unfolding around you. Each person you meet is a spark catching fire in a direction you get to witness but cannot control, turning observation into a gift that multiplies the moment it is shared. Hold them in the question—who are they? I wonder what they could be?—and let the endless awakening become real in your own body.

practice.title: Open the Field
practice.instruction: Soften your jaw and let your shoulders drop as if setting down a weight you did not realize you were carrying.

practice.title: Wonder as Lens
practice.instruction: Rest your attention on the next person you see and silently ask, "Who are they? I wonder what they could be?" without needing an answer.

practice.title: Receive the Echo
practice.instruction: As you exhale, let the feeling of sparks catching fire in every direction become real in your body, recognizing this witnessing as a gift that multiplies the moment it is shared.
